LAW AND MOTION 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS UNOPPOSED AND THE DEFENDANT DID NOT OBJECT TO THE FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT PREPARED BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DAVID STEINMAN'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT RELEASE LANGUAGE MUST MAKE IT CLEAR THAT THE RELEASES EXTEND ONLY TO ACTS DONE THOUGH THE DATE OF THE STIPULATED CONSENT JUDGMENT, AND NOT TO FUTURE ACTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Judgment; Memo Of P & A And Dec
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Freund, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael Freund, Tel. 510.540.1992, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party;
Thomas Harvey, Esq. of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP, Tel. 415.553.5700, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

The tentative ruling was unopposed and the defendant did not object to the form of order and judgment prepared by the plaintiff. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DAVID STEINMAN'S MOTION To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Judgment is Granted in part and denied in part. The settlement agreement release language must make it clear that the releases extend only to acts done though the date of the stipulated consent judgment, and not to future acts. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-11-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2011 Set For Trial On Jul-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
